finding: `.atm/config.json` enables external task-ledger mirroring and contains a broker evidence path under `../3KLife`, but `next --prompt` still fails with `ATM_PLANNING_ROOT_MISSING` unless the operator separately knows to set `ATM_PLANNING_REPO_ROOT`; the required configuration key and expected root are not surfaced by preflight.
expectedBehavior: Bootstrap/doctor/next should discover or validate the configured planning repository, or provide a repo-local exact configuration command and explain why planning-root resolution is required before task routing.
evidenceOrRepro: 2026-07-12: initial `next --prompt` failed; the actual root `C:\Users\User\3KLife\docs\ai_atomic_framework` existed, but `.atm/config.json` had no `taskLedger.planningRoots` and the environment variable was unset. A process-local env override removed this error.
followUp: Add planning-root discovery/configuration guidance and a preflight regression for broker-only external paths versus task-ledger planning roots.
